clips.title: The Giant
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, powerful grade. A city street from ground level, tall buildings converging above. A worm's-eye view from the ground looking straight up at a person standing over the camera, towering against the bright sky, looking down. A person in a long coat. Bright sky, dramatic upward perspective, worm's-eye view. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: Under the Canopy
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, natural grade. A forest floor, towering trees soaring up to a canopy far above, shafts of light. Day, warm. A worm's-eye view from the ground looking straight up past a person standing among the trees, gazing upward, trees converging overhead. A person in outdoor clothes. Warm dappled light, soaring perspective, worm's-eye view. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: Ground Level
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, urban grade. The base of a glass skyscraper from ground level, the tower soaring up and converging into the sky. A worm's-eye view from the ground looking steeply up at a person standing at the building's base, dwarfed, looking up. A person in business attire. Bright daylight, extreme upward perspective, worm's-eye view. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: Overhead
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, sleek grade. Beneath a modern glass walkway, structural beams and bright sky above. A worm's-eye view from below looking straight up through the glass at a person walking across the transparent floor overhead. A person in smart clothes. Cool bright light, striking upward perspective, worm's-eye view. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Leap
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, dynamic grade. A bright open sky above a skate park ramp. A worm's-eye view from the ground looking straight up as a person leaps over the camera mid-jump, silhouetted against the sky, arms out. A person in streetwear. Bright sky, dramatic upward motion, worm's-eye view. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Hero
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, heroic grade. A dramatic sky with scattered clouds above. A worm's-eye view from the ground looking steeply up at a person standing tall and powerful against the sky, hands on hips, chin up. A person in a windswept coat. Bright dramatic sky, heroic upward angle, worm's-eye view. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.
